conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
I have been really tired. I used to be able to get up and go, but now I just feel like I am dragging myself through the day.
How long has it been since you felt like you could get up and go?
It's been a few years now. I used to work full-time, but I had to stop because I just couldn't keep up.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yes. I sit down to watch TV, and I can't even follow the plot. I just find myself staring at the screen, but I don't know what's going on.
How long has it been since you could comfortably follow a TV show?
Months. It used to be my favorite thing to do, but now I can't even stay awake long enough to finish an episode.
How have you been sleeping lately?
I don't sleep much. I wake up a lot during the night, and when I do, I just lie there.
How long do you usually lie awake when you wake up?
Hours. Sometimes I don't even get out of bed until the sun is up.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Not really. I used to love gardening, but I haven't been able to get out there in ages. I just miss doing things that make me happy, you know?
What's kept you from getting out to the garden?
Just the energy. I used to love being in the sun, but now it just makes me tired.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
More of the same, I suppose. Just trying to get through the days without too much pain.
Can you tell me more about what makes the days feel like something to just get through?
It's just the exhaustion. I don't know what's wrong with me, but I just can't seem to get out of this fog.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yes. I look at the calendar, and I just can't decide what to do. It sounds silly, but I used to be able to plan a whole day, and now I can't even decide what to eat for breakfast.
How long has it been since you could easily plan your day?
Years. It used to be my thing, keeping everything organized. Now I just have to get through the day without losing my train of thought.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No. I used to be the one who kept everyone going, and now I'm just... nothing.
How long has it felt like you've gone from keeping everyone going to feeling this way?
A long time. I just feel like I've lost the person I used to be.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
No. I used to love reading, but I haven't picked up a book in years.
What else that you used to enjoy feels different now?
Everything. I used to love music, but I haven't listened to a single song in months.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
My energy levels. I wish I could just wake up feeling normal again.
How long has it felt like your energy hasn't been normal?
Years. It's just... I used to be the one who kept everyone going, and now I'm just... nothing.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
I don't know. I just feel like I've lost my life.
What feels like it's been lost?
My identity. I used to be the person who made things happen, and now I'm just... there.
How's your appetite been?
It's terrible. I eat because I have to, but I have no appetite for the things I used to love.
Have you noticed any changes in your weight because of this?
Yes. I've lost a lot of weight, and it's just... I don't know how to stop it.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yes. I cry a lot. It's just... I don't know what's wrong with me.
